description: Encounter authoring + review packet loop from case definitions (Q1/Q4).
goal: Advance scenario bank authoring, review packets, traces, actor turns, and replay-safe persistence with admin consumption path.
autonomy: Execute without human approval. Subagents write handoff JSON only. Integrator appends one line to PROJECT_STATUS.md and dequeues next slice.
anti_toil_pivot: If evidence-only on seeds, pivot to wired authoring or admin consumer with visible replay delta.
